reason: Review gate: tsc+vite build must pass, forbidden patterns (any, console.log, untyped invoke, swallowed IPC errors, mutated state), review checklist
Verify no any, typed invoke<T>/event payloads, TS types aligned with the Rust serde game-state shape, import type usage
Verify the command/invoke contract stays in sync (name/args/return/registration) and commands return Result<T,E> with frontend try/catch
Verify any added plugin has a matching, minimal capability in default.json
Run the 'after adding/changing a command' checklist against the React<->Rust boundary; catch serde/TS field-rename drift
